creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Upgrading to the latest ports version causes grief for security/openvas and friends, notably security/py-notus-scanner and security/py-ospd-openvas.

Starting notus_scanner.
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/notus-scanner", line 8, in <module>
    sys.exit(main())
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/notus/scanner/daemon.py", line 130, in main
    run_daemon(
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/notus/scanner/daemon.py", line 86, in run_daemon
    client = MQTTClient(
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/notus/scanner/messaging/mqtt.py", line 35, in __init__
    super().__init__(client_id=client_id, protocol=mqtt.MQTTv5)
TypeError: __init__() missing 1 required positional argument: 'callback_api_version'
Exception ignored in: <function Client.__del__ at 0x8760a9a60>
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paho/mqtt/client.py", line 874, in __del__
    self._reset_sockets()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paho/mqtt/client.py", line 1133, in _reset_sockets
    self._sock_close()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paho/mqtt/client.py", line 1119, in _sock_close
    if not self._sock:
AttributeError: 'MQTTClient' object has no attribute '_sock'
Starting gvmd.
Starting ospd_openvas.
Warning: using insecure memory!
Warning: using insecure memory!
Warning: using insecure memory!
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/ospd-openvas", line 8, in <module>
    sys.exit(main())
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ospd_openvas/daemon.py", line 1245, in main
    daemon_main('OSPD - openvas', OSPDopenvas, NotusParser())
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ospd/main.py", line 152, in main
    daemon.init(server)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ospd_openvas/daemon.py", line 501, in init
    client = MQTTClient(
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ospd_openvas/messaging/mqtt.py", line 39, in __init__
    super().__init__(client_id=client_id, protocol=mqtt.MQTTv5)
TypeError: __init__() missing 1 required positional argument: 'callback_api_version'
Exception ignored in: <function Client.__del__ at 0x890990550>
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paho/mqtt/client.py", line 874, in __del__
    self._reset_sockets()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paho/mqtt/client.py", line 1133, in _reset_sockets
    self._sock_close()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paho/mqtt/client.py", line 1119, in _sock_close
    if not self._sock:
AttributeError: 'MQTTClient' object has no attribute '_sock'
Starting gsad.
